message:
fix: route demo to crossterm-compat backend on non-Unix hosts

The default demo was broken on Windows because the non-Unix path
resolved to a headless 1x1 backend. Now uses cfg-gated backend
selection: native ftui-tty on Unix, crossterm-compat on Windows.
(closes #49)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
